artPrompt: A dramatic moment of a great spinning wheel of judgment mounted before the clock tower at midnight, its blank unmarked segments blurring in cold gold light as a tumbling six-sided die hovers above it and ashen-robed figures kneel in dread below. Sparks and ash whirl off the wheel's rim. The wheel dominates the upper wide frame, doom raining down. Wide 4:3 landscape, bone white, deep black, and cold gold, end-times fervor, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Wheel of Judgment
text: Roll a six-sided die. Put a doom counter on the Doomsday Clock. 1–2 — each opponent discards a card. 3–4 — destroy target creature. 5 — each opponent loses 3 life and you gain 3 life. 6 — all of the above, and the wheel keeps spinning; roll again.
flavorText: "Spin to find out how you'll be judged. Spoiler: harshly."

extras.interaction: adds a die roll to the table, feeding the clock
